mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_preference (user_id, job_preferences, soft_skills, mbti, holland, big_five, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{jobPreferences}, #{softSkills}, #{mbti}, #{holland}, #{bigFive}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_preference SET job_preferences = #{jobPreferences}, soft_skills = #{softSkills}, mbti = #{mbti}, holland = #{holland}, big_five = #{bigFive}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_preference WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
